backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the PPS school management backend, defining data types (Circular, Session, Class, Student, Teacher, Timetable, Fee, etc.) and CRUD operations with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (login screen, admin dashboard, circulars module, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of four frontend files: TeacherProfile, TeacherMenu, index.css, and tailwind.config.js, describing their purpose and key UI characteristics.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the default light and dark color themes used across the frontend.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the PPS React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for login, admin, and teacher dashboards, including role-based redirect guards and a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing it when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes with an orange/amber primary accent, Inter font, and a scrollbar-hide utility class.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that wraps the App with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
Admin academics page with a menu-driven interface covering progress reports, leave requests, subjects, teacher academics, salary, and attendance sections.
Admin circulars page for creating, editing, viewing, and deleting school circulars with session/class targeting and image attachment support.
Main admin dashboard shell with a top header, bottom tab navigation, and content routing across all admin sub-pages like circulars, sessions, students, teachers, and more.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminEventCalen: Admin event calendar page that displays a monthly calendar filtered by session, allowing admins to add, edit, or delete event descriptions for specific dates.
Admin page for managing school greetings with CRUD operations, supporting image uploads, session/class targeting, and a dialog-based form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLeave.tsx: Admin page for viewing and managing teacher leave requests, allowing filtering by session and approving or rejecting pending requests.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLessonPlan: Admin read-only view listing lesson plans submitted by teachers, with a detail view showing teacher, class, subject, topic, and date information.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminSessions.t: Admin page for managing academic sessions and their classes, supporting adding sessions/classes, navigating into class details, and controlling session visibility.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminStudents.t: Admin page for managing student records with full CRUD, a detailed profile view, and a pass/transfer feature to move students between sessions and classes.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminTeachers.t: Admin page for managing teachers, supporting add/edit/delete operations with a form dialog and a detailed teacher profile view, filtered by session.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminTeacherTim: Admin page for building and managing per-teacher timetables, allowing period entries to be added per day with class and subject assignments.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ClassDetailView: Detail view for a specific class within a session, providing tabbed navigation to Students, Timetable, Subjects, Teacher, and Fees sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ClassFees.tsx: Fee management component for a class, allowing per-student monthly fee entry (approved, pending, total amounts) with automatic late fee accrual logic.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ClassStudents.t: Student management component for a class, supporting add/edit/delete and student transfer (pass) to another session and class, with a detailed profile view.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ClassSubjects.t: Subject management component for a class, allowing subjects to be added with an optional teacher assignment and deleted, with an optional read-only teacher view.
Timetable editor for a class, enabling period entries (name, number, day) to be added and saved, with day-based filtering of the displayed schedule.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page for Palak Public School supporting admin, teacher, and student roles with hardcoded school code and admin credentials, navigating to role-specific dashboards on success.
frontend/src/pages/teacher/TeacherCommun: Teacher messaging UI that allows selecting a class and student, viewing message history, and sending text messages or file attachments to individual students.
frontend/src/pages/teacher/TeacherDashbo: Main teacher dashboard layout with a header (session selector, logout), bottom navigation tabs, and routing between Home, Communication, Profile, and Menu views.
frontend/src/pages/teacher/TeacherHome.t: Teacher home screen displaying today's date and a filterable list of circulars relevant to the teacher's session and class, with a detail view for each circular.
frontend/src/pages/teacher/TeacherMenu.t: Teacher menu page providing navigation to sub-sections including My Class, Timetable, Leave, Salary, Progress, Homework, Lesson Plan, Event Calendar, Greetings, and My Academics.
frontend/src/pages/teacher/TeacherProfil: Displays the logged-in teacher's profile information including name, teacher number, session, qualification, contact, email, address, and class incharge assignment.
frontend/src/store/appStore.ts: Zustand store defining all application data interfaces (users, sessions, students, teachers, circulars, timetables, fees, attendance, etc.) and the global app state with actions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography/shadow/animation settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for the PPS School ERP app, documenting the three user roles (Admin, Teacher, Student), architectural notes, existing features, and UI/business logic rules.
